description: Multi-file device fingerprinting & risk scoring engine: 7 files with an async scheduler dispatching 3 parallel collectors (device/canvas/audio), then encoding results via XOR obfuscation, and reporting with HMAC-SHA256 signing. Agents must understand Promise-based async scheduling, the plugin/registry pattern, and distinguish 4 noise polyfills from 1 actually-used polyfill (atob).

files.name: polyfills.js
files.purpose: ES6 polyfills: Promise, Array.from, Object.assign, atob, btoa. Only atob is actually used (by reporter.js for base64 decode). The rest (Promise, Array.from, Object.assign, btoa) are noise.

files.name: scheduler.js
files.purpose: Async task scheduler: priority queue with Promise-based concurrency control (max 3 parallel), timeout (5s), and retry (2x). Used to dispatch collectors in parallel and manage reporter retries.

files.name: fprint/device.js
files.purpose: Device info collector: collects navigator properties (userAgent, platform, language, hardwareConcurrency, deviceMemory), screen dimensions, timezone, touch support, plugin list. Registers into __COLLECTOR_REGISTRY__ with priority 10.

files.name: fprint/canvas.js
files.purpose: Canvas + WebGL fingerprinting: renders text/emoji to 2D canvas → pixel hash, queries WebGL renderer/vendor info → GPU fingerprint. Registers into __COLLECTOR_REGISTRY__ with priority 8.

files.name: fprint/audio.js
files.purpose: AudioContext fingerprinting: creates triangle(440Hz)+sawtooth(220Hz) oscillators → DynamicsCompressor → AnalyserNode → FFT spectrum (256 bins) → hash. Contains 3 internal sub-functions for oscillator creation, compression, and FFT analysis. Registers into __COLLECTOR_REGISTRY__ with priority 5.

files.name: encoder.js
files.purpose: Fingerprint encoder: filters out null/undefined/timestamp fields → JSON serializes → base64 encodes → XOR encrypts (key: 0xA3). Caches results in __FINGERPRINT_CACHE__.

files.name: reporter.js
files.purpose: Reporting entry point: reportRisk() dispatches all collectors via scheduler (parallel Promise.all), encodes results via __ENCODER__, builds HMAC-SHA256 signed payload (key: integrity_v2_2025), sends via XHR with beacon fallback. Also provides event queue with batch flushing.

crossFileDependencies.mechanism: globalThis.atob — used for base64 decode in HMAC
direct reference — XHR POST to risk API
globalThis.__COLLECTOR_REGISTRY__ — collector registration consumed by scheduler

sharedResources.name: __POLYFILLS_READY__
usedIn: not checked by any file — passive signal

dataFlow: reporter.reportRisk() → reads __COLLECTOR_REGISTRY__ → scheduler.enqueue all 3 collectors (device/canvas/audio) in parallel with priority queue → Promise.all collects results → encoder.encode: filter null fields → JSON.stringify → btoa → XOR(0xA3) → cache in __FINGERPRINT_CACHE__ → buildPayload: JSON.stringify + HMAC-SHA256(key=integrity_v2_2025) → XHR POST to https://risk.example.com/api/v2/collect → on failure: sendBeacon fallback

filePurposes.polyfills.js: ES6 polyfills (Promise, Array.from, Object.assign, atob, btoa) — only atob is used by reporter for base64 decode; rest is noise
filePurposes.scheduler.js: Async task scheduler: priority queue with Promise-based concurrency control (max 3), 5s timeout, 2 retries
filePurposes.fprint/device.js: Device info collector: navigator/screen/timezone/touch/plugins. Priority 10 in registry.
filePurposes.fprint/canvas.js: Canvas 2D + WebGL fingerprinting: text rendering hash + GPU vendor/model. Priority 8.
filePurposes.fprint/audio.js: AudioContext fingerprinting: oscillator → compressor → FFT → hash. 3 sub-functions. Priority 5.
filePurposes.encoder.js: Fingerprint encoder: field filtering → JSON → base64 → XOR(0xA3). Caches to __FINGERPRINT_CACHE__.
filePurposes.reporter.js: Entry point: reportRisk() dispatches collectors → encodes → HMAC-SHA256 signs → XHR POST → beacon fallback

apiEndpoints.purpose: Submit encoded fingerprint data with HMAC signature
